summary: Frontend testing of TruckersNav iteration 8: 2-finger touch rotation (all map modes) + Device Compass Mode button. All 15 review items PASS via code review + browser automation. Filter panel, North-up/Heading-up toggle, compass button toggle, blue glow + ping dot all confirmed working.
action_items: PRE-EXISTING BUG (not introduced by this PR): `L.point(...).rotate is not a function` console error fires in heading-up mode (lines 3196 and 3256 of NavigationView.tsx). Leaflet's standard Point class does not have a `.rotate()` method. The call is inside a try-catch so it does not crash, but the ahead-offset pan is silently skipped in heading-up mode. Fix: use manual trigonometry instead (dx = offsetPixels * sin(heading), dy = offsetPixels * cos(heading)) or install a Leaflet plugin that adds Point.rotate.
critical_code_review_comments: index.css lines 24-31: .leaflet-rotate-pane has transition (line 25) and transform (line 30) as two SEPARATE rules — this is intentional and correct (no .map-heading-up parent prefix). PASS
NavigationView.tsx line 276: isCompassMode state declared adjacent to manualRotation (line 275). PASS
NavigationView.tsx line 277: compassHeadingRef = useRef(0) declared. PASS
NavigationView.tsx lines 279-286: manualRotation useEffect applies CSS immediately for north-up mode (!isCompassMode guard present). PASS
NavigationView.tsx lines 339-389: device compass useEffect with setup(), webkitCompassHeading (iOS) and alpha fallback (Android), iOS permission request, absolute+relative event listeners. PASS
NavigationView.tsx lines 3186-3203: updateRotationAndPan early return for isCompassMode (only does follow-pan, skips heading logic). PASS
NavigationView.tsx line 3274: isCompassMode in telemetry useEffect deps array. PASS
NavigationView.tsx lines 4881-4882: isCompassMode + setIsCompassMode both passed to MapControls. PASS
MapControls.tsx lines 232-243: Active state shows blue-500/20 bg + border + shadow-[blue glow] + animate-ping dot. PASS

PRE-EXISTING: L.point().rotate() is not a standard Leaflet API — both compass pan (line 3196) and heading-up pan (line 3256) will silently fail inside try-catch. This is NOT caused by the new compass feature.

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at http://localhost:8001. Vite+Express single-stack. Splash screen takes ~4.5s to clear (MIN_SPLASH_MS=2800 + 750ms exit). USE_MOCK_DATA=true in FirebaseProvider.tsx — no auth needed. Navigation view accessed via sidebar 'Navigation' link. compass-mode-btn testid is on right-side map control panel. Filter panel: button[title='Filter POIs']. North/Heading toggle: button[title='Switch to Heading Up'] or 'Switch to North Up'. MOCKED: Load Board freight data, DeviceOrientationEvent browser limitation. PRE-EXISTING BUG: L.point().rotate() not a standard Leaflet method — console error in heading-up/compass pan code (caught by try-catch, no crash).
rca_of_issue: PRE-EXISTING: L.point(...).rotate is not a function — Leaflet's Point class does not expose .rotate(). Code at NavigationView.tsx lines 3196 and 3256 calls point.add(L.point(0, offset).rotate(angle)). Fix: replace with manual trig — const rad = (heading * Math.PI) / 180; const offsetPt = point.add(L.point(Math.sin(rad) * offsetPixels, -Math.cos(rad) * offsetPixels));
